official_website.note: https://www.jhnordic.com is confirmed as the Jackson Hole Nordic Alliance website, the primary resource for Nordic skiing in Jackson Hole.

typical_race_date.note: The Johnny Curtis Memorial Race, a major Jackson Hole Nordic event, occurs in early February (February 7-8, 2026). The Drift race occurs in March (March 13-15, 2026). No evidence found of a major Jackson Hole Nordic Marathon in late January.
